evidence.snippet: With over 50 years of experience in conformal coating engineering and applications, SCS is the world leader in Parylene, liquid, plasma polymerized, ALD and multilayer conformal coating technologies. We’re a direct descendant of the companies that originally developed Parylene, and we leverage that expertise on every project – from initial planning to process application.

Lightweight protection increases the reliability of UAVs
[Get the E-book!](/ebook-uav/)

items.notes: Parylene, epoxy, silicone, acrylic and plasma polymer conformal coatings applied to UAV electronic assemblies.

evidence.snippet: #### [SCS Launches New G4 Spin Coater and Upgrades 6800 Series with Improved Design Features](https://scscoatings.com/newsroom/scs-launches-new-g4-spin-coater-and-upgrades-6800-series-with-improved-design-features/)

items.notes: Ionograph Series and Omegameter SMD 650 are PCB ionic contamination test instruments sold alongside coating services.

products_categories.notes: SCS provides conformal coating services (Parylene, liquid, plasma, ALD, multilayer) — polymer protective coatings for electronics used in UAVs. None of the allowed categories maps perfectly; structures_and_materials is the closest fit given 'polymers' in the definition. They also sell PCB cleanliness testing equipment (Ionograph, Omegameter).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: SCS supplies protective polymer conformal coatings (materials + application services) applied to UAV electronics. They have a dedicated 'UAV and Support System Coatings' application page and a UAV-specific e-book. They serve many industries broadly but have a clear UXV-specific product/service line.

ndaa.notes: Compliance page lists ITAR registration, RoHS, REACH, Nadcap, AS9100, ISO 9001 — no mention of NDAA Section 848 or 889 compliance.
